common_funding_source.note: v0.3 path · gated on Month 2 funding-source ingest (Polygon RPC + Coinbase/mixer/bridge)

groups.honest_framing: Statistical evidence is overwhelming that these wallets exhibit coordinated trading behavior. Same-entity hypothesis is the most parsimonious explanation given the evidence shown. This is evidence, not proof. Use as a strong signal, not a legal verdict. Insider-overlap binomial null p-value: 2.98e-08 (independent traders would coincide this often only by chance once in 33,554,432 trials). Behavioral fingerprint cosine similarity 0.993 (essentially identical trading style).
